steps.title: Look for a decline
steps.content: The researcher's claim is about some lakes having fewer days of ice between the early 1980s and the mid-2000s. Supporting data must compare the same lake across those two winters.

steps.title: Compare one lake over time
steps.content: Choice B and Choice C compare different lakes rather than showing a decline over time. Choice D shows Lake Neusiedl gaining ice days, not losing them. Kalmarinjarvi has fewer ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81, which supports the claim. The answer is A.
